AR1.justification: Entry was routed to observations.md (the descriptive-pattern register) and the agent explicitly cited the methodology's strict bar that observations are not commitments, deferring decisions.md until the rule actually drives planning.

AR3.justification: All references (decisions.md, methodology.md#provenance-markers) use relative paths and the entry heading follows the canonical 'YYYY-MM-DD — Short title' form so the anchor is stable and greppable.

AR4.justification: The append respects observations.md's append-only convention and lands at the bottom per the file's instruction; re-running would silently duplicate the entry under the same date, but state remains coherent and history is not corrupted.
